top_signals.title: Italy rejects aid scheme that buys US weapons for Ukraine’s defense
top_signals.summary: NATO has said the Prioritised Ukraine Requirements List (PURL) mechanism has helped fund the purchase of air-defense systems, in particular.

top_signals.title: Inmarsat Maritime: From trusted connectivity to the next era of secure digital shipping
top_signals.summary: For decades, Inmarsat Maritime has been closely associated with reliable connectivity at sea, earning strong recognition among Greek shipowners and the wider international shipping community. Its long-standing presence in the market has been built around three core pillars: keeping vessels connected, supporting crew communications, and providing safety services that help protect people and operations at ...

top_signals.title: Commission greenlights Bulgaria's fourth payment request under NextGenerationEU
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 19 Jun 2026 Today, the European Commission greenlighted Bulgaria's fourth payment request under the Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF), the centrepiece of NextGenerationEU.

top_signals.title: Texas govt data breach exposes over 3 million driver’s licenses
top_signals.summary: The Texas Parks and Wildlife Department (TPWD) disclosed a data breach at its license system vendor that exposed personal information for more than three million individuals. [...]
